overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a historic Southern plantation estate. The character follows wet brick pathways around the property, passing formal gardens with manicured hedges, a stone well, and various outbuildings under dark stormy skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side of a large brick plantation house with white columns

entered.detail: two-story red brick building with white columns and porch railing
wet cobblestone brick path reflecting the overcast sky
manicured green hedge row lining the path
large terracotta planter with spiky plant near house entrance
brick pillar with metal bell on top marking garden entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow brick pathway between a large plantation house on the right and manicured hedges on the left. The wet cobblestones reflect the stormy sky, and a decorative planter sits near the house entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with manicured hedges and outbuildings

events.description: turns corner of main house entering formal garden area with symmetrical hedges

agents.ego_description: proceeding through formal garden paths between tall hedges toward distant outbuildings

entered.detail: small octagonal brick building with conical dark roof
red painted wooden outbuilding with dark roof
circular stone well with raised rim in grassy area

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a formal garden with tall hedges on both sides. An octagonal tower and red wooden outbuilding appear in the distance, while a stone well sits to the right of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved garden path returning toward main house entrance

events.description: path curves right bringing the main house back into view

agents.ego_description: following the curved path back toward the main house, approaching a person sitting on the entrance steps

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the steps of the main house entrance

entered.detail: front entrance of the plantation house with white columns and steps

segments.scene_description: The brick path curves around, bringing the main house back into view on the right. A person sits on the entrance steps as the character approaches the front of the house again.

events.description: passes the main house and enters the outbuilding area with utility poles visible in distance

agents.ego_description: walking past the main house toward the octagonal tower and red wooden outbuildings

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: Moving past the main house, the character approaches the octagonal tower and red wooden outbuilding. Utility poles become visible in the distance, and the path continues toward more rural structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with utility lines and open fields

events.description: passing the red wooden building, landscape opens to fields with distant farm structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the brick path past utility poles toward distant buildings in the open countryside

entered.detail: small structures visible in the far distance across open fields

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more open rural area with utility poles lining the right side. The red wooden building falls behind as the character walks toward distant farm buildings visible across the fields.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the structured confines of a plantation estate and gradually expands into an open rural landscape. It begins with the character walking along a narrow brick pathway between a large house and manicured hedges, where the wet cobblestones reflect a stormy sky. As the path opens into a formal garden, the camera passes a stone well and reveals an octagonal tower and red wooden outbuilding in the distance. The scene then curves back toward the main house, passing a person seated on the entrance steps before shifting focus toward the distant tower and utility poles. Finally, the camera moves past the red wooden building and into an open rural area, following the path as it stretches toward distant farm buildings across the fields.
